chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P No. S-72 of 2026 Date Orders with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection flag ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 16-03-2026 Mr. Riaz Ahmed Buriro, Advocate a/w petitioners. Mr. Aftab Nek Muhammad Bhutto, Assistant A.G. * * * * * * * * * * * * * * Mr. Bahadur Ali Shahani, Advocate, files vakalatnama/power of attorney on behalf of private respondents No.4 to 7 and 9, which is taken on record. Learned Assistant Advocate General, Sindh files statements on behalf of the official respondents, which are also taken on record. Copies of the statements filed by the private as well as official respondents are supplied to the learned counsel for the petitioners. Learned A.A.G. submits that the official respondents are bound to act strictly in accordance with law and assures that no harassment shall be caused to the petitioners. Learned counsel for the petitioners, after going through the statements made by the official as well as private respondents, seeks disposal of the instant petition. Accordingly, the instant petition is disposed of with the direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and ensure that no harassment is caused to the petitioners. The official respondents shall also provide lawful protection to the petitioners, if required, in accordance with law. JUDGE
